claim_boundary.next_gate: Implement mature canonical-environment DMRG/MPS with convergence and cost ledgers, or provide a same-access response oracle with full state-preparation and measurement costs.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: This is not a production DMRG implementation, not a canonical-environment solver, not a quantum response kernel, not a same-access positive B10 route, and not an accuracy-per-resource win.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: A cross-reference readiness audit over the current B5 tensor and embedding pressure references.

readiness_gates.label: Canonical left/right environments are present
readiness_gates.required_next_step: Implement canonical-center sweeps with stored left/right environments and orthonormal residual checks.

readiness_gates.label: Production DMRG is available
readiness_gates.required_next_step: Replace prototype optimizers with a mature finite-system DMRG/MPS solver and convergence ledger.

readiness_gates.label: Non-seeded tensor references beat the seeded pressure reference
readiness_gates.required_next_step: Produce non-exact-state-seeded tensor rows that beat the seeded MPS pressure reference under the same D5 observables.

readiness_gates.label: Two-site prototype improves mean response error over one-site ALS
readiness_gates.required_next_step: Improve the two-site update or demote it behind the stronger one-site ALS pressure reference.

readiness_gates.label: Prototype fixed-sector norms are stable before normalization
readiness_gates.required_next_step: Add canonical gauges and sector-aware initialization so selected states do not rely on tiny fixed-sector projection norms.

readiness_gates.label: Best non-seeded max response error is within seeded pressure max error
readiness_gates.required_next_step: Close the worst-row gap to the exact-state-seeded pressure reference before claiming a mature tensor denominator.

readiness_gates.label: Same-access quantum response kernel exists
readiness_gates.required_next_step: If pursuing a quantum route, add state-preparation, mixing, measurement, and confidence costs on the same rows.

readiness_gates.label: Full cost accounting is ready for B10 same-access comparison
readiness_gates.required_next_step: Add wall-clock, matvec, sweep, memory, shot, and optimizer-loop costs before feeding a positive B10 route.
